title: GPT-5.5 Is Not Just a Better Chatbot. It Is an Operator Upgrade.
angle: A founder/operator playbook for using GPT-5.5 as a faster execution layer in agentic workflows, with Codex-style examples for reports, dashboards, and internal tools.

title: ChatGPT Image 2.0 and Claude Design: The Founder’s Guide to Faster Brand Assets
angle: A practical guide for founders to use ChatGPT Image 2.0 and Claude Design together for rapid visual prototyping, brand briefs, campaign assets, and design workflows.

title: Claude Cowork Connectors: How Founders Turn AI Into a Real Command Center
angle: A beginner-friendly connector stack guide showing founders how MCP, Windsor.ai, Apify, Zapier, N8N, Notion, GitHub, Vercel, and other tools turn AI into an operating command center.

title: 60 Days With OpenClaw: The Founder’s Guide to Building an AI Operating System
angle: A founder-focused evaluation of OpenClaw after 60 days, covering pros, cons, cost mindset, local models, cron jobs, and how to design AI agent systems around real bottlenecks.
